name: TinyPNG
weakness: Has a strict 5MB file size limit for free users and requires a paid subscription for bulk processing.
ourAdvantage: 100% free with absolutely no file size limits or paywalls. We compress massive images instantly using browser-based WebAssembly.

name: iLoveIMG
weakness: Uploads your sensitive images to their remote backend servers, raising privacy concerns.
ourAdvantage: Privacy-first architecture. Your images are processed entirely on your own device (client-side) and are never uploaded to any external servers.

name: Adobe Express
weakness: Requires mandatory account creation and login just to resize or convert a simple image.
ourAdvantage: No sign-up, no login, no friction. Just drag and drop your image and get the result instantly.

name: Canva
weakness: Heavy, bloated interface that is slow to load if you just need to do a quick crop or resize.
ourAdvantage: Lightning-fast, purpose-built utility. Our tools load in milliseconds and don't require navigating complex menus.

name: EZGIF
weakness: Outdated interface with strict upload file size limits and slow server-side rendering.
ourAdvantage: Modern UI with infinite scaling. We use your device's local CPU to process GIFs and videos natively, resulting in zero upload times.

name: 11zon
weakness: Cluttered interface heavily monetized with intrusive pop-up advertisements.
ourAdvantage: Clean, premium, ad-light experience built for professionals who value their time and workspace.

name: CompressJPEG
weakness: Limited format support and batch processing restrictions.
ourAdvantage: Universal format support (WebP, AVIF, HEIC) with unlimited batch processing capabilities.
